name: Image Tools
tagline: Privacy-first image utilities that run entirely in your browser.
description: Compress, resize, convert, crop, rotate, strip metadata, watermark, merge, and batch-process images — all on your device via Web Workers. Nothing is uploaded.
features: Compress, resize, convert, crop, rotate, strip metadata
All processing happens on your device

name: JSON Toolkit
tagline: Format, validate, and minify JSON in the browser.
description: Privacy-first JSON utility. Paste or load JSON locally, pretty-print, minify, validate with parser error details, and copy output — no data leaves your browser.
features: Paste JSON or load from a local file

name: Image Metadata Viewer
tagline: Inspect image metadata and EXIF locally.
description: Upload images via drag-and-drop or file picker to view filename, size, dimensions, MIME type, and embedded EXIF metadata. Export everything as JSON.
features: Filename, size, dimensions, and MIME type

name: Password Strength Lab
description: Test password strength locally with a 0–100 score, practical improvement tips, and a one-click strong password generator.
features: Checklist for length, character types, patterns, and common words
Actionable suggestions to improve weak passwords

name: Markdown Editor
tagline: Browser-based Markdown workspace with local file storage.
description: Write and preview Markdown in the browser with OPFS-backed local persistence. A lightweight workspace for notes and docs.

name: Database Lab
tagline: Visual schema builder with integrated PGLite.
description: Design tables, columns, and relations on a canvas, apply DDL to an in-browser Postgres (PGLite), then run SQL queries and browse data. Combines the former Schema Builder and PGLite Playground.
features: Visual table/column editor with relation edges
Canonical SchemaIR with deterministic SQL generation
Integrated PGLite — apply schema, run SQL, browse data
Local autosave, revision history, and IndexedDB persistence

name: Live Wallpaper
tagline: Video, slideshow, and HTML wallpapers behind your desktop icons.
description: Windows live wallpaper engine with multi-monitor support, per-display playlists, power profiles, tray controls, and global hotkeys.
features: Video, image slideshow, and HTML/WebView2 wallpapers
Power profiles, tray controls, and global hotkeys
